phases.name: characterize-review-contracts
phases.precondition: `src/continuous_refactoring/cli.py` still owns `_handle_review`, `_handle_review_list`, `_handle_review_perform`, `_resolve_review_context`, `_REVIEW_USAGE`, and the `run_agent_interactive` import used by review tests. `src/continuous_refactoring/review_cli.py` does not exist. The current review tests pass.

phases.name: extract-review-cli
phases.precondition: Phase 1 is complete. Review behavior is characterized by tests. `cli.py` still owns the review handlers and `review_cli.py` does not exist.

phases.name: clarify-run-boundary
phases.precondition: Phase 2 is complete. Review handling has moved to `review_cli.py`. `cli.py` still owns `_validate_targeting`, `_handle_run_once`, `_handle_run`, and `_run_with_loop_errors`, and the focused review tests pass against the new module.

phases.name: contract-sweep
phases.precondition: Phases 1 through 3 are complete. Review command execution lives in `review_cli.py`; run dispatch remains in `cli.py`; focused review, run, and command-dispatch tests pass.
